# Rip Packs City

## Overview
Rip Packs City (RPC) is a collector intelligence platform for NBA Top Shot and NFL All Day digital collectibles on the Flow blockchain. Founded by Trevor Dillon-Bond, an official Portland Trail Blazers Team Captain on NBA Top Shot.

## What RPC Does
- **Wallet Analytics**: Analyze any collector's wallet with real-time Fair Market Value (FMV), badge detection, serial premium calculations, and Flowty marketplace ask prices
- **Sniper Feed**: Real-time deal finder that compares listings from both NBA Top Shot and Flowty marketplaces against FMV to surface undervalued moments
- **Pack Tools**: Expected value calculator for NBA Top Shot pack drops with pull odds analysis
- **Badge Tracker**: Explore badge editions including Top Shot Debut, Rookie Year, Championship, and computed serial badges
- **Set Intelligence**: Track set completion progress, identify bottleneck moments, and find the cheapest completion path
- **Public Profiles**: Shareable collector profiles with trophy cases and portfolio analytics

## FMV Methodology
RPC calculates Fair Market Value using a proprietary pipeline: weighted average price from recent sales, recency decay, sales volume confidence scoring, and serial/badge premium adjustments. FMV data is refreshed every 20 minutes via automated ingestion.

## Technical Details
- Built on Next.js with server-side rendering
- Data stored in Supabase (PostgreSQL)
- Flow blockchain integration via FCL (Flow Client Library)
- Aggregates listings from NBA Top Shot marketplace and Flowty
- Public FMV API available for partner integrations

## URL Structure
- Homepage: /
- Collection pages: /nba-top-shot/collection, /nba-top-shot/packs, /nba-top-shot/sniper, /nba-top-shot/badges, /nba-top-shot/sets
- Profiles: /profile/[username]

## Contact
- Twitter: @RipPacksCity
- Website: https://rip-packs-city.vercel.app
